title: blumea sylvatica
intro: Blumea sylvatica, also known as the elephant ear daisy or white daisy bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Blumea sylvatica include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating various skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make topical creams and ointments for skin care and wound healing.
